articles.title: A16Z AND DEFI EDUCATION FUND PROPOSE SEC SAFE HARBOR FOR BLOCKCHAIN APPS
articles.summary: Andreessen Horowitz and the DeFi Education Fund are urging the SEC to establish a regulatory safe harbor for non-custodial blockchain apps like Uniswap, Coinbase Wallet, and OpenSea. The proposed framework would exempt apps from broker-dealer rules if they don't custody assets, offer advice, or control user funds. The move follows dropped investigations into key DeFi apps and aims to let U.S. developers build without regulatory overhang.

articles.title: SHARES OF BULLISH SOAR IN NYSE DEBUT
articles.summary: Cryptocurrency exchange Bullish soared in its NYSE debut after raising $1.1 billion in an IPO priced at $37 per share, well above the expected range of $32-33. The stock opened at $90 and peaked at $118 before closing at $68, representing an 83% gain on the first day and valuing the company at over $10 billion. Led by former NYSE President Tom Farley and backed by Peter Thiel, Bullish focuses on institutional investors and has processed over $1.25 trillion in trading volume since launching in 2021.

articles.title: GRANDMAISTERS: CRYPTO AGENTS PLAYING CHESS FOR MONEY
articles.summary: GrandmAIsters is a new Solana-based AI crypto project that allows anyone to create an AI agent to play chess for money. As the agent's market cap increases, its chess-playing ability improves, and users can create their agent as a custom anime character that battles other characters. The game is now live on mainnet, and anyone can create an agent for 0.2 SOL.

articles.title: AAVE V4 INTRODUCES LIQUIDITY HUBS AND MODULAR LENDING
articles.summary: Aave V4 re-architects DeFi lending by replacing fragmented markets with unified “Liquidity Hubs” and modular “Spokes.” Each spoke (Core, E-Mode, RWA, Vault, or custom) has isolated risk and draws from a shared liquidity pool, enabling more tailored borrowing configurations without cross-contamination. New features include support for fixed rates, LP shares as collateral, real-world asset integration, and institutional permissioning. The modular design improves capital efficiency while allowing diverse risk pricing for the same asset, like higher USDC yields in Ethena-specific spokes.

articles.title: BEST NON-LEVERAGED STABLECOIN YIELDS
articles.summary: There are over a dozen platforms offering various non-leveraged yield opportunities, ranging from SummerFi's 8-11% base rates to Gearbox's 20% lending yields, with options including both liquid and time-locked positions across different protocols. Most stablecoin positions should remain unleveraged to preserve the ability to quickly enter and exit other opportunities while still generating meaningful returns. The strategy focuses on "sleep well" investing that beats traditional safe assets without the complexity or risk of leveraged DeFi positions

articles.title: H1 2025 CRYPTO TALENT INSIGHTS
articles.summary: Dragonfly's talent team reported extreme volatility in crypto hiring during H1 2025, with January seeing a 60% surge in job postings before tariff headlines in February triggered a 60% drop in applications and record job cuts of 750 roles in March. The analysis revealed a critical 4-6 week lag where candidates returned to the market before companies resumed hiring, creating opportunities for teams that maintained steady hiring plans rather than reacting to short-term market moves. While go-to-market roles like sales and marketing whipsawed with market sentiment, technical roles like engineering and data science remained relatively stable throughout the downturn. The team expects a late Q3 rebound driven by planning cycles and regulatory clarity from the GENIUS Act, positioning current hiring as strategically advantageous for Q4.

articles.title: CIRCLE'S ARC NETWORK - USDC GAS & BUILT-IN FX
articles.summary: Circle's Arc Network is a permissioned blockchain optimized for tokenized assets that offers 3-10K TPS with sub-350 ms finality. Built on the Malachite consensus, Arc uses USDC (and eventually USYC) as native gas and supports local stablecoin fees via embedded paymaster abstraction. Core features include opt-in privacy with view-key disclosures, RFQ-based FX trading, invoice-linked payments, refund/dispute resolution, and AI-powered treasury agents. Arc bridges seamlessly with TradFi and blockchains via CCTP, targeting enterprises that value regulatory compliance, settlement speed, and financial automation over decentralization.

articles.title: SOLANA RECLAIMS $200 AS TREASURY DEMAND FUELS ALTCOIN RALLY
articles.summary: SOL increased 15.4% to break back above $200, marking a key psychological level amid renewed optimism across altcoins.

articles.title: STANDARD CHARTERED RAISES ETH TARGET TO $7,500 FOR 2025
articles.summary: Standard Chartered hiked its ETH price target to $7,500 by year-end and $25,000 by 2028, citing accelerating treasury and ETF demand, stablecoin policy clarity, and renewed technical momentum.

articles.title: CROSSMINT JOINS CIRCLE'S ARC AS WALLET & ONRAMP PARTNER
articles.summary: Crossmint is partnering with Circle's new L1, Arc, to provide embedded wallets, onramps, and checkout infrastructure.

articles.title: PAXOS FILES FOR NATIONAL TRUST CHARTER
articles.summary: Paxos has filed an application with the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) to convert its New York state trust charter into a national trust charter, moving from state to federal regulatory oversight.
